name: Budget Calculator and Translator flow
description: Test the Budget Calculator and AI Translator features

planSteps.description: Click the green 'حاسبة التكلفة' (Budget Calculator) button
Type 'Paris' as destination, '5' as number of days, and select a travel style
Verify accommodation, food, transportation, activities costs and a total are displayed, each including a dollar sign
Type 'أين أقرب مستشفى' as the text and 'Japan' as the target language
Verify a translation and pronunciation guide are displayed
